title: Complementarity and Competition: Exact Source-Hash Deduplication vs. Fuzzy Concept Name Merging in LLM Wiki Graphs
wikilinks: Wiki Deduplication and Concept Merging in LLM Wikis
Copilot Session Checkpoint: Mobile Graph UI + Wiki Dedup
summary: How do exact source-hash deduplication and fuzzy concept name merging complement or compete in maintaining a coherent LLM Wiki knowledge graph?
